---
title: "PAAR: HARM"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

MISSION <br> 
**H**ORSESHOE CRABS **A**TTACK **R**ANGA’S **M**ETHODS

**MISSION LOCATION** <br> 
LANTAU ISLAND AND CHEK LAP KOK, HONG KONG, SAE (SUPREME ASIAN EMPIRE)

**MISSION STARTED - MISSION CLOSED** <br> 
1434, 16 AUG 1990 - 1643, 20 AUG 1990

**CLIENT - CONTRACT DATE** <br> 
PUMICE CONSTRUCTION -  12 AUG 1990

**REMARKS** <br> 



**MERCENARIES INVOLVED - CODENAMES - STATUS** <br> 
████████████████████ - DAZZLING FIREWORKS - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - LANCED BULL - KIA <br>
████████████████████ - STEAM GAZELLE - ACTIVE <br>
████████████████████ - BLINK HARE - ACTIVE <br>

https://m-gemmell.github.io/PRIMEVAL_DEITIES/Missions/M-HARM.html

Last session of PUML the team successfully killed the cruel creator of the Mutant Horseshoe crabs. This gave Farrier, the Brooding Horseshoe Crab, the revenge she so desired, allowing her to leave the island. Unfortunately Blanchard the Hyperborean took advantage of Farrier's exit to capture her. What is his intentions? Is it related to Dr. Petra Pufferfish? Find out in tonight's mission "Blanchard's Winter".
